app.name: VitePress
app.one_liner: A Vue-powered static site generator built on Vite for fast, modern documentation sites.

screens.name: Documentation Site
screens.purpose: Display rendered documentation from Markdown files with live preview during development.

rust_commands.name: build_site
rust_commands.purpose: Compile Markdown and Vue components into a static HTML site.

rust_commands.name: serve_dev
rust_commands.purpose: Start a local development server with hot module replacement.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement dev server with HMR
acceptance_tests: Site renders Vue components embedded in Markdown correctly
User can run 'vitepress build' and get a deployable static site
User can run 'vitepress dev' and see live-updating docs at localhost
